title: COMET Product Carbon Footprint
description: JSON Schema for a COMET ProductCarbonFootprint (PCF). Defines the structure for declaring the greenhouse gas emissions associated with one unit of a product, aligned with ISO 14067, GHG Protocol, PACT v3, and EU CBAM requirements.

@context.description: JSON-LD context(s). Must include the COMET context URI; may include PACT v3 context for interoperability.

pcfId.description: Unique identifier for this PCF declaration.

declaredUnit.description: The functional unit in which the carbon footprint is expressed.

unitaryProductAmount.description: The amount of product per declared unit for which the PCF is calculated.

fossilGWP.description: Fossil-fuel-derived GHG emissions in kgCO2e per declared unit, excluding biogenic carbon.

totalGWP.description: Total GWP including biogenic carbon (kgCO2e per declared unit). Null if not calculated.

fossilEmissions.description: Absolute fossil GHG emissions (kgCO2e). May differ from fossilGWP when unitaryProductAmount != 1.

biogenicCarbonContent.description: Biogenic carbon content of the product in kgCO2e per declared unit.

biogenicUptake.description: Biogenic carbon withdrawal (uptake) in kgCO2e per declared unit.

landUseChange.description: GHG emissions from direct land-use change (dLUC) in kgCO2e per declared unit.

aircraftEmissions.description: GHG emissions from aircraft transport in kgCO2e per declared unit.

packagingEmissions.description: GHG emissions from packaging in kgCO2e per declared unit.

exemptedPercent.description: Percentage of emissions exempted from the PCF calculation (must be < 5% per ISO 14067).

ipccAR.description: IPCC Assessment Report version used for GWP characterization factors.

standardRef.description: Cross-sectoral standards used in the PCF calculation.

pcrName.description: Name of the Product Category Rule (PCR) applied, if any.

allocationDescription.description: Description of the allocation rules applied to multi-output processes.

referencePeriod.description: The time period over which emissions data was collected.

material.description: The product or material to which this PCF applies.

site.description: The production site where the product is manufactured.

primaryDataShare.description: Percentage of the PCF based on primary (site-specific) data, as opposed to secondary (database) data.

dqi.description: Data Quality Indicators per the PACT/Pathfinder DQI framework.

coveragePercent.description: Percentage of total product output covered by this PCF.

verification.description: Third-party assurance information for this PCF.
